notes: v1.3.0 — Two big ones. Reclaim Storage: de-duplicate the mods, shaders and resource packs shared across your instances (hard-linked to a single copy) to free gigabytes — the disk icon on the Instances page. Play with a Friend: open your world to LAN in Minecraft, click Host, and Anchor forwards the port through your router (UPnP) so a friend joins over the internet with Direct Connection — no server, no account, nothing in the middle. Works wherever your router allows UPnP.
